DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Jordan Sussman, Esq. 415-986-3644 for Plaintiff (In-person).
Robert Foster, Esq. 858-720-8900 Sheppard Mullin Richter & Hampton LLP for Defendant.
Lisa Madden, Esq. 415-851-5900 Law Offices of Madden & Lynch PC for non-demurring Defendants.

ARGUED. Mr. Sussman contests the portions of the tentative ruling granting the demurrer and dismissing the first, third and fourth causes of action without leave to amend. Mr. Foster contests the portions of the tentative ruling overruling the second cause of action for medical negligence.

After arguments, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BALLET ASSOCIATION DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
